site.title: HeyBiscuit | AI Voice Agents That Actually Get Things Done
site.description: Build an AI voice agent that answers calls, qualifies leads, and books appointments around the clock so you never miss another sale.

sections.header: Stop letting missed calls cost you sales.
sections.subheader: Biscuit replaces clunky answering services and call centers. Build an AI agent that sounds human, answers immediately, qualifies leads, and books appointments 24/7.

image.alt: Biscuit dashboard showing active calls and answered rates

sections.text: Trusted by fast-growing businesses that live on the phone

sections.header: Everything your phone line needs, built right in.

features.title: Conversations that actually sound human.
features.description: Your agent sounds natural, handles interruptions perfectly, and adapts to the caller's answers. Say goodbye to awkward, robotic "press 1 for sales" menus.

features.title: Set up a new number in seconds.
features.description: Pick a local or toll-free number immediately, or simply forward your existing business line to your Biscuit agent. You'll be taking calls out of the box.

features.title: Run outbound campaigns while you sleep.
features.description: Upload a CSV, set a schedule, and let your agent automatically dial through your lead list. Every call outcome is logged, transcribed, and tracked in real-time.

sections.header: Live and taking calls in under 5 minutes.

steps.title: Tell the AI about your business.
steps.description: Explain who you are, what you do, and provide FAQs or pricing so it answers accurately without halluncinations.

steps.title: Get a phone number.
steps.description: Choose a new local line or forward your current one. Your AI agent is instantly ready to start dialing and receiving.

steps.title: Let it run.
steps.description: Your agent answers questions, texts follow-up links, and syncs booked appointments straight to your chosen calendar.

sections.text: Plugs directly into the tools you already rely on.

questions.question: Can Biscuit text customers after a call?
questions.answer: Yes. Biscuit can seamlessly send SMS confirmations, scheduling links, or follow-up texts straight from the same phone number immediately after a call ends.

questions.question: How smart is the AI really?
questions.answer: You can choose from the top models available, including GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet, guaranteeing high-quality reasoning capable of holding natural qualification conversations.

questions.question: What happens if a caller asks a question the AI doesn't know?
questions.answer: You can configure your agent's fallback behavior to politely take a message, escalate to a live human instantly via multi-agent routing, or promise an SMS follow-up.

sections.header: Stop missing calls. Start closing more leads.
sections.description: Set up your AI phone agent in minutes. No contracts. No hardware. No engineering team required.
